memoryArtifacts.headline: Wlliam De Arches also Known As (William De Bradford) Bio
memoryArtifacts.description: William de Arches was the son of Osbert de Arches. William along with his wife Ivetta, found the Benedictine Priory at Nun Monkton. There was no male heir to this family, so Thorp passed to Ivetta who …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Guillaume d'Arques於1095年出生在英國越可爾塔德卡斯特時，他的父親Osbern d'Arques36歲，母親Rohese de Bollington26歲。他於1115年與Yvette de York在英國越可爾牛頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1154年在英國英格蘭諾斯 越可爾斯卡格列索普享年59歲，埋葬在英國越可爾吉斯波洛。

nameMeanings.name: d'Arques
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Jose, Carlos, Mario, Luis, Fernando, Jorge, Armando, Ana, Joaquin, Julio, Marcos.  Portuguese Joao, Joaquim, Paulo, Henrique, Lourenco, Seraphine, Vasco.

Catalan (Marquès); Spanish and southern French (Marqués): from Catalan marquès, Spanish and Occitan marqués ‘marquis’, words of French origin (see Marquis ), applied either as a nickname for someone who behaved like a marquis or as an occupational name for a servant in the household of a marquis.
Portuguese: patronymic from the personal name   Marcos  .

variants.name: Marquis
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Normand, Marcel, Fernand, Lucien, Rosaire, Andre, Armand, Camille, Cecile, Jacques, Francois.

French: from the title marquis ‘marquess’, applied as an ironic nickname to someone who behaved like a marquis or as a metonymic occupational name for a servant in the household of a marquis. The title, derived from an ancient Germanic word meaning ‘boundary’ (compare March ), originally referred to the governor of a border territory. Marquises did not form part of the original French feudal structure of nobility; the title was first adopted by the Counts of Toulouse because of their possessions in the border region beyond the Rhône. Compare Markee and Markey .

English: nickname from Middle English markis ‘marquis, marquess, nobleman’ (Old French marchis); see also 1 above. The word is also found as a female personal name which may also be origin of the surname.

nameMeanings.name: Guillaume
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: William
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Guillaume d'Arques was born in 1095, in Tadcaster, Yorkshire, England, his father, Osbern d'Arques, was 36 and his mother, Rohese de Bollington, was 26. He married Yvette de York in 1115, in Newton, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1154, in Scagglethorpe, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 59, and was buried in Guisborough, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guillaume d'Arques est né en 1095, à Tadcaster, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Osbern d'Arques, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Rohese de Bollington, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Yvette de York en 1115, à Newton, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1154, à Scagglethorpe, North Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à Guisborough, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guillaume d'Arques 1095 in Tadcaster, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Osbern d'Arques 36 und seine Mutter Rohese de Bollington 26. Er hat 1115 in Newton, Yorkshire, England Yvette de York geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1154 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Scagglethorpe, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Guisborough, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume d'Arques è nato il nel 1095 nel Tadcaster, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Osbern d'Arques, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Rohese de Bollington, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Yvette de York nel 1115, nel Newton, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1154, nel Scagglethorpe, North Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolto a Guisborough, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Guillaume d'Arquesが1095年にイギリスヨークシュアイアタドカスターで生まれた時，父Osbern d'Arquesは36歳，母Rohese de Bollingtonは26歳であった。1115年にイギリスヨークシュアイアニュートンでYvette de Yorkと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1154年にイギリスイギリスノース ヨークシュアイアスカググレソルペで59歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアグイスボロウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Guillaume d'Arques(이)가 1095년 영국 요르크실르 타드카스터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Osbern d'Arques(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Rohese de Bollington(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1115년 영국 요르크실르 뉴턴에서 Yvette de York(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1154년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스 요르크실르 스카글레소에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 길스버루에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume d'Arques nasceu em 1095, em Tadcaster, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Osbern d'Arques, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Rohese de Bollington, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Yvette de York em 1115, em Newton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guillaume d'Arques родился в 1095 г. в местности тадкастир, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Osbern d'Arques было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Rohese de Bollington, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Yvette de York в 1115 г. в местности нютон, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1154 г. в местности скаглетаурп, норт еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности гуисбороую, еркшир, Англия.

Se casó con Yvette de York en 1115, en Newton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas.
